_usage_local: Place at ~/.codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json (user home) or open via Windsurf Settings → Cascade → MCP Servers → Configure
_usage_remote: Use the remote URL for cloud bridge access (no local server needed)
_feature_ssot: SSOT.md auto-created on first MCP initialize — agent context ready instantly
_note_windsurf_format: Official Windsurf MCP config uses root key 'mcpServers'. For HTTP servers use 'serverUrl' field. For stdio use 'command' + 'args'. File location: ~/.codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json. See: https://docs.windsurf.com/mcp

zombiecoder-remote._description: ZombieCoder cloud bridge — auto-SSOT, per-session RAG, agent tools

zombiecoder-stdio._description: Spawn MCP server directly (standalone mode — requires full project checkout)
